deltas.summary: Codex 0.115.x changes the visible feature surface and promotes `multi_agent` to stable.
checks: Re-run `npm run verify` after upgrading Codex CLI.
Recheck `hooks.json` and the `SessionStart` / `Stop` hook smoke path after upgrading.
Reinstall Chedex with `npm run install:user` if the hook runtime or managed hook config changed.

deltas.summary: Codex 0.116.x adds the `userpromptsubmit` hook, smoother plugin install/sync flows, and app-server TUI ChatGPT sign-in/token refresh support.
checks: Review whether Chedex should adopt `UserPromptSubmit` or intentionally stay on `SessionStart` / `Stop` only.
Recheck plugin/setup assumptions if your workflow depends on plugin suggestions, connector installs, or remote plugin sync.
Re-run `npm run verify` after upgrading Codex CLI.

deltas.summary: Codex 0.117.x makes plugins first-class, enables the app-server-backed TUI by default, and shifts multi-agent workflows toward path-based agent addressing.
checks: Review any repo assumptions tied to legacy handlers removed in 0.117.x, including `read_file`, `grep_files`, and the old artifact tool.
Recheck plugin-first workflows and app-server TUI behavior after upgrading.
Refresh mirrored hook assets with `npm run refresh:mirror` and reinstall with `npm run install:user` if the managed runtime changed.

deltas.summary: Codex 0.118.x improves sandbox reliability, adds prompt-plus-stdin support to `codex exec`, strengthens first-write protection for project-local `.codex` files, and restores several app-server and MCP workflows.
checks: Re-run `npm run verify` after upgrading Codex CLI.
Re-run `npm run install:user:dry` to confirm the managed hook surface still resolves as expected on 0.118.x.
If you rely on app-server-backed workflows, smoke-test hook replay, `/copy`, `/resume`, and MCP startup behavior after upgrading.

deltas.summary: Codex 0.119.x expands MCP, plugin-cache, remote/app-server, and TUI resume workflows while keeping the native hook surface unchanged.
checks: Re-run `npm run verify` after upgrading Codex CLI.
If you rely on MCP apps, custom MCP servers, or plugin-backed workflows, smoke-test those paths after upgrading.
If you rely on remote/app-server or TUI resume flows, smoke-test `/resume`, remote `--cd`, and any workspace-specific remote setup after upgrading.

deltas.summary: Codex 0.120.x improves hook rendering, adds MCP `outputSchema` metadata in code mode, and introduces a distinct `/clear` SessionStart source in addition to startup and resume.
checks: Re-run `npm run verify` after upgrading Codex CLI.
Re-run `npm run install:user:dry` to confirm the managed hook surface still resolves as expected on 0.120.x.
Before broadening any managed SessionStart matcher, smoke-test startup, resume, and `/clear` hook payloads on the target Codex build.
